{{Quote|Feel the music. Let it flow through you.|translated=1|Bib Surool|<ref name="KOTOR" />}}
'''Bib Surool''' was a green [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] and a manager for the [[Starlight Entertainers]]. He was recruiting new talent for the group on [[Taris/Legends|Taris]] when the [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] invaded and instituted a quarantine in [[3956 BBY]]. Though he could neither get off world nor communicate with the group, he continued auditioning talent, including dancer [[Lyn Sekla]].<ref name="KOTOR" />
